projectDescription: A monthly curated newsletter sharing interesting and beginner-friendly open-source projects from GitHub, published on the 28th of every month.
keyFeatures: Monthly curated newsletter of interesting and beginner-friendly GitHub open-source projects
Projects organized by programming language (C, C++, Go, Python, JavaScript, Rust, and more)
123+ issues published since inception covering thousands of open-source projects
Available in Chinese, English, and Japanese
Published on the 28th of every month
Contributor recognition program with hall of fame
Automation scripts for content generation and project discovery
publicApiSurface: make_content.py <issue_number|all> — regenerate monthly issue content files
github_bot.py — collect and filter trending GitHub projects via GitHub API
content/HelloGitHub{N}.md — Chinese monthly issue content files
content/en/HelloGitHub{N}.md — English monthly issue content files
hellogithub.com/periodical — web interface for browsing issues
